scripts.start: npx -y concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
scripts.start:win: start cmd /c "cd backend && .\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload" & start cmd /c "cd frontend && npx vite --host --port 5173"
scripts.install:all: cd backend && python -m pip install -r requirements.txt && cd .. && cd frontend && npm install
